name: BEYBLADE X XONE
developer: 株式会社グルーブボックスジャパン
short_description: 'BEYBLADE X XONE is a "Beyblade action" game that faithfully recreates the BEYBLADE X series (distributed by TOMY Company, Ltd.) that is popular among fans of all ages. Battle through intense Beybattles and aim for the top of The X!
detailed_description:
Experience action-packed Beyblade battles in a stadium equipped with BEYBLADE X's signature X-celerator Rail as you unleash the Xtreme Dash and use the game's original "Active Gauge" to execute exciting tactical maneuvers!

■STORY

A completely new story featuring original game characters!

A new tournament, The X Championship, is being held at The X. Compete with rivals, deepen bonds, and aim for the top of The X!

■BATTLE

Completely recreates the ultra-accelerated battles of BEYBLADE X!

Feel the impact of extreme acceleration in a stadium equipped with the X-celerator Rail.

When you "Let it rip!", the "Active Gauge" fills over time. Use it to unleash critical "Attacks" and "Counters" one after another!

Unleashing critical attacks increases the X Gauge! When it reaches MAX, choose the skill you want to activate.

Skills operate on a rock-paper-scissors system. Choose a skill that gives you an advantage over your opponent!

When you win, activate the skill and knock your opponent out in spectacular fashion!

■CUSTOMIZE

Customization takes X Skills into account and offers over 100 million possible combinations!

Freely combine parts and skills to set up your Beyblade just the way you want.

■ONLINE BATTLES

In online battles, you can compete against Bladers from all corners of the globe anytime, anywhere!

Challenge Bladers from around the world and aim for the top.

*The ranking specifications may differ slightly from other platforms.

■DOWNLOADABLE CONTENT

Additional Beyblades will be gradually released as downloadable content!


　

©Homura Kawamoto, Hikaru Muno, Posuka Demizu, BBXProject, TV TOKYO

© ＴＯＭＹ

© FURYU Corporation.

*All images are from an in-development version of the game. Content and specifications may differ in the final product.
